title: 72.8 x 35.4 inches Car Front Windscreen Cover, Windshield Snow Cover Protector Heavy Duty Ultra Thick Snow Ice Frost Sun UV Dust Water Resistant in all Weather
features: Excellent Materials: The car windscreen cover consists of 4 layers of cloth. Aluminum film+polyester+Oxford cloth+Composite Cotton. Each layer is made of the most appropriate material, thicker and durable fabriceffectively protect the windshield from the ice, snow, frost, rain, sun, leaves and dust.

Year-round Useful: One car windscreen cover can fit well with all seasons. In spring, the cover can prevent dust from accumulating on the windshield; in summer,it can block harmful UV from damaging car interiors; in autumn, it can reduce the time you spend in cleaning up fallen leaves; in winter, it can avoid deep snow covering car windscreen. Save your cleaning time.

Universal Size: The car windscreen cover in large size,185 x 90 cm / 72.8 x 35.4 inches, fits most types of cars well. Please see the advertising map for specific dimensions. Please measure your vehicle prior to purchase to ensure your cover fits.

Easy to Use:You only need to open the cover and put it on the front window glass of the car. The 2 thin flaps can be trapped in the doors to fix them securely, and it does not affect the door of the seal. The unique flaps design of our snow cover is both convenient and practical.
